---
title: "Strata Insurtech Platform - Real-Time Risk Classification & Premium Optimization"
---
## GitHub Repository: [strata-insurtech-platform](https://github.com/gitaukennedy/insurtechplatform)

## Project Architecture & Core Layout

A high-performance, decoupled microservices architecture designed to transition traditional insurance pricing into real-time, risk-optimized premium generation.

# 🛡️ Enterprise InsurTech Analytics & Actuarial Stress-Testing Suite

[![FastAPI Engine](https://img.shields.io/badge/Backend-FastAPI-009688?style=flat-square&logo=fastapi&logoColor=white)](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com)
[![Streamlit App](https://img.shields.io/badge/Frontend-Streamlit-FF4B4B?style=flat-square&logo=streamlit&logoColor=white)](https://streamlit.io)
[![Docker Container](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Docker-2496ED?style=flat-square&logo=docker&logoColor=white)](https://www.docker.com)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg?style=flat-square)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

An enterprise-grade, microservice-driven data science platform designed for real-time risk classification, optimal premium pricing, and macro-level portfolio stress-testing. 

The core architecture completely decouples actuarial calculation engines from user interfaces via an elastic, container-ready FastAPI gateway, deploying machine learning workflows directly to production environments.

---

## 📊 Core Architecture Overview

This platform replaces rigid, legacy insurance look-up tables with an integrated multi-model pipeline running real-time risk assessment:

1. **Claims Frequency Engine:** XGBoost Poisson Regression model calculating predicted annualized claim counts using custom exposure-offset boundaries.
2. **Claims Severity Engine:** LightGBM Gamma Regression engine forecasting financial liability magnitudes per claim instance.
3. **Retention Survival Engine:** Cox Proportional Hazards model measuring real-time account churn vulnerabilities and elasticity shifts during rate adjustments.

---

## Cloud Deployment Infrastructure ##
The application architecture is split globally into a highly scalable, container-managed cloud deployment layout:

Backend Engine API: Containerized via native multi-stage Dockerfile mechanics and hosted on Render Cloud Infrastructure, exposing high-performance REST endpoints over public networks.

Frontend Cockpit Interface: Live-hosted on Streamlit Cloud Web Services, communicating dynamically with the Render API over secure HTTPS protocols.


Comprehensive Project Documentation🛡️ Core Problem 

StatementTraditional insurance pricing models (like Generalized Linear Models or GLMs) are historically rigid, relying heavily on static demographic tables updated quarterly or annually. 

In modern high-volatility financial ecosystems, this creates two massive operational vulnerabilities:

Adverse Selection: 
Delayed pricing adjustments mean safe drivers or low-risk policyholders overpay, driving them to faster-moving competitors.

Lapse Volatility: 
High-Rate hikes applied blanket-wide without behavioral risk overlays cause unpredictable customer churn, destabilizing an insurance company’s capital reserves.

📐 The Data Science & Architectural SolutionThis platform addresses these vulnerabilities by decoupling the underwriting logic from the user interface using a high-performance Microservices Architecture.

Instead of monolithic code, the system processes risk requests through an elastic, container-managed API gateway (main.py) powered by three separate machine learning models:

Claims Frequency Engine: 
An XGBoost Poisson Regression model that predicts how often a policyholder will file a claim within a specific exposure window.

Claims Severity Engine:
A LightGBM Gamma Regression model that predicts the financial magnitude of a claim if it occurs.

Retention Survival Engine: 
A Cox Proportional Hazards model that evaluates a policyholder's price-elasticity and statistical likelihood of immediate churn based on historical tenure and proposed rate changes.

---

##[ Frontend: Streamlit Cloud UI ]
               │
               ▼ (Secure Cloud REST Traffic)
[ Gateway API: FastAPI on Render Cloud ]
               │
      ┌────────┼────────┐
      ▼        ▼        ▼
  [XGBoost] [LightGBM] [Cox PH]
  Frequency Severity   Survival




├── requirements.txt         # Production-locked application dependencies
├── test_pipeline.py         # Automated unit test and validation suite
└── Dockerfile               # Environment blueprint for containerized deployment
